data.title: Emperador Inc. Schedules Virtual Annual Stockholders’ Meeting for May 2025
data.description:
Emperador Inc. ( (SG:EMI) ) just unveiled an update.

Emperador Inc. has announced that its Annual Stockholders’ Meeting will be held virtually on May 19, 2025. The meeting will cover key agenda items including the approval of previous meeting minutes, management’s report for 2024, appointment of independent auditors, ratification of board actions, and the election of directors. Stockholders of record as of April 15, 2025, are entitled to participate and vote in the meeting. This announcement underscores Emperador’s commitment to maintaining transparency and engaging with its stakeholders in corporate governance matters.

More about Emperador Inc.

Emperador Inc. is a company based in the Philippines, primarily involved in the production and distribution of alcoholic beverages. The company focuses on the global market, leveraging its strong brand presence and diverse product offerings to maintain its competitive edge.

Average Trading Volume: 10,492

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Jinke Smart Services Announces Trading Halt Pending Inside Information Release
data.description:
An update from Jinke Smart Services Group Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:9666) ) is now available.

Jinke Smart Services Group Co., Ltd. has announced a trading halt of its H shares on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited, effective from March 28, 2025. This halt is pending the release of an announcement related to the Hong Kong Code on Takeovers and Mergers, which contains inside information about the company.

More about Jinke Smart Services Group Co., Ltd. Class H

Jinke Smart Services Group Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating within the smart services industry. The company is listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited under the stock code 9666.

data.title: NXT Energy Solutions Reports 2024 Financial Results Amidst Strategic Expansion
data.description:
NXT Energy Solutn ( (TSE:SFD) ) has shared an announcement.

NXT Energy Solutions reported its 2024 year-end financial results, highlighting significant operational activities and financial challenges. The company completed several SFD® surveys across different regions, secured new contracts, and received industry recognition for its technology. Despite these achievements, NXT faced a net loss of $9.08 million for the year, with a decrease in SFD®-related revenues and increased general and administrative expenses. The company aims to strengthen its market position through strategic partnerships and regional market penetration.

More about NXT Energy Solutn

NXT Energy Solutions Inc. operates in the energy sector, specializing in providing advanced survey technologies for oil, gas, and geothermal exploration. The company focuses on expanding its market presence in Africa, Southeast Asia, and South Asia, utilizing its proprietary SFD® technology to enhance exploration efficiency.

data.title: Theta Gold Mines Secures Investment Boost from Pensworth Holdings
data.description:
Theta Gold Mines Ltd. ( (AU:TGM) ) has issued an announcement.

Theta Gold Mines Limited announced that Pensworth Holdings Limited, a significant investor, has exercised 30 million unlisted options into ordinary shares, raising funds for the TGME Gold Mine Project in South Africa. The funds will be used for equipment purchases, staff training, and site preparation, reflecting investor confidence and supporting the company’s strategic growth in the gold mining sector.

More about Theta Gold Mines Ltd.

Theta Gold Mines Limited is a gold development company that holds a range of prospective gold assets in South Africa, particularly in the renowned gold mining region near Pilgrim’s Rest in Mpumalanga Province. The company focuses on constructing and financing a new gold processing plant at the TGME plant, with plans to develop a 12.9-year mining operation starting in 2023, aiming to produce 1.24 million ounces of contained gold. Theta Gold Mines has access to over 43 historical mines and prospect areas, with a significant focus on shallow, open-pit, or adit-entry shallow underground hard rock mining sources.

YTD Price Performance: -56.25%

Average Trading Volume: 6,203

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $82.89M

data.title: Ilwella Pty Ltd Reduces Stake in Findi Limited
data.description:
An announcement from Findi ( (AU:FND) ) is now available.

Findi Limited has experienced a change in the interests of its substantial holder, Ilwella Pty Ltd, as of March 27, 2025. The voting power of Ilwella Pty Ltd in Findi Limited has decreased from 6.60% to 5.54%, reflecting a slight reduction in their stake. This change may impact the company’s shareholder dynamics and influence within the company, potentially affecting strategic decisions and stakeholder interests.

data.title: Times Neighborhood Holdings Announces Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
An update from Times Neighborhood Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:9928) ) is now available.

Times Neighborhood Holdings Limited has announced a final cash dividend of RMB 0.036 per share for the financial year ending December 31, 2024. The dividend will be approved by shareholders on May 29, 2025, and paid on June 23, 2025. This announcement reflects the company’s stable financial performance and commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

More about Times Neighborhood Holdings Ltd.

Times Neighborhood Holdings Limited operates in the real estate industry, focusing on property management services. The company is known for providing comprehensive property management solutions, catering to residential and commercial properties, primarily in the Chinese market.

data.title: CanadaBis Capital Upsizes Convertible Debenture Financing to $4.5 Million
data.description:
CanadaBis Capital, Inc. ( (TSE:CANB) ) just unveiled an update.

CanadaBis Capital Inc. has announced an increase in its brokered private placement of unsecured convertible debentures to $4.5 million due to strong investor demand. The debentures, which bear an interest rate of 11% per annum and are convertible into common shares, will mature 48 months from the closing date. This financing move is part of CanadaBis’s strategy to expand its operations, and it coincides with a planned arrangement with Simply Solventless Concentrates Ltd., though the financing is not contingent on this arrangement. The announcement highlights CanadaBis’s efforts to strengthen its financial position and expand its market presence in the cannabis industry.

More about CanadaBis Capital, Inc.

CanadaBis Capital Inc. is a vertically integrated Canadian cannabis company focused on achieving large-scale growth in the global cannabis market, with a particular emphasis on supplying the fast-emerging concentrates category through their Stigma Grow cultivation and BHO extraction facility.

data.title: SNBL and Tasso, Inc. Form Joint Venture to Distribute Blood Collection Device in Japan
data.description:
The latest update is out from Shin Nippon Biomedical Laboratories, Ltd. ( (JP:2395) ).

Shin Nippon Biomedical Laboratories, Ltd. (SNBL) and Tasso, Inc. have announced a joint venture to distribute Tasso’s on-demand blood collection device in Japan. This collaboration aims to enhance self-medication, preventative medicine, and telemedicine in Japan, potentially reducing the burden on medical professionals. While the joint venture’s immediate impact on SNBL’s business performance is minor, it is expected to expand the company’s presence in telemedicine over the medium to long term.

More about Shin Nippon Biomedical Laboratories, Ltd.

Shin Nippon Biomedical Laboratories, Ltd. (SNBL) operates in the biomedical industry, focusing on contract research and translational research services. The company is known for its strong network in the United States and Japan, facilitating collaborations between academia, investors, and professional companies.

data.title: ReadyTech CFO Nimesh Shah Steps Down Amid Global Search for Successor
data.description:
ReadyTech Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:RDY) ) has issued an update.

ReadyTech Holdings Ltd. announced the departure of its Chief Financial Officer, Nimesh Shah, who played a crucial role in the company’s financial strategy and growth, including its successful ASX listing in 2019. The company has initiated a global search for a new CFO, with Shah assisting in the transition, and remains well-positioned for continued growth with a strong leadership team and strategic direction.

More about ReadyTech Holdings Ltd.

ReadyTech is a leading provider of mission-critical SaaS solutions for sectors including education, employment services, workforce management, government, and justice. The company focuses on people management systems, offering technology that aids in navigating complexity and delivering meaningful outcomes.

data.title: Sembcorp Signs 25-Year Renewable Energy Agreement with Meta Subsidiary
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Sembcorp Industries ( (SG:U96) ).

Sembcorp Industries has signed a 25-year Renewable Energy Purchase Agreement with Malkoha, a subsidiary of Meta Platforms, to build and operate a 150MWp floating solar photovoltaic system on Kranji Reservoir. This project will supply renewable energy to Meta’s operations in the region, including its data centers in Singapore, and is expected to begin construction in 2027, with no immediate impact on Sembcorp’s financials for 2025.

More about Sembcorp Industries

Sembcorp Industries is a company operating in the energy sector, focusing on renewable energy solutions. It provides services such as solar energy systems and aims to support sustainable energy initiatives.
